New Technology

AI Agents Embedded in NFTs:
The Game Has Changed

AI Agents are now embedded in NFTs on the CFC Marketplace, each trained specifically on its content.

When you open a book, article, or workshop NFT in the marketplace reader, you are not just accessing content. You are interacting with an AI Agent that understands the material and helps you move through it.

As you engage, your participation is tracked and can be rewarded through the CFC Token rewards within the ecosystem.

This brings content, guided interaction, and participation into a single designed experience that changes how people engage with knowledge.

Intelligent Content Interactive Experience Token Rewards
